471	    async def _generate_stream_content(
472	        self,
473	        content: Dict[str, Any],
474	        index: int,
475	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
476	        stream_offsets: Dict[int, int],
477	        reasoning_parser_dict: Dict,
478	        parser_dict: Dict,
479	        has_tool_calls: Dict[int, bool],
480	        choice_logprobs: Optional[Dict],
481	        finish_reason_type: Optional[str],
482	        continuous_usage_stats: bool,
483	        prompt_tokens: Dict[int, int],
484	        reasoning_tokens: Dict[int, int],
485	        completion_tokens: Dict[int, int],
486	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
487	        """Generate SSE chunks for streaming content."""
488	        offset = stream_offsets.get(index, 0)
489	        if self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.incremental_streaming_output:
490	            delta = content["text"]
491	        else:
492	            delta = content["text"][offset:]
493	            stream_offsets[index] = len(content["text"])
494	
495	        # Attach logprobs to the first chunk emitted this step (reasoning,
496	        # tool-call, or content) so they aren't dropped when a parser is active
497	        # nor duplicated across chunks; flush any leftover at the end.
498	        remaining_logprobs = choice_logprobs
499	
500	        # Handle reasoning content
501	        if self.reasoning_parser and request.separate_reasoning:
502	            reasoning_text, delta = self._process_reasoning_stream(
503	                index,
504	                delta,
505	                reasoning_parser_dict,
506	                content,
507	                request,
508	                finish_reason_type,
509	            )
510	            if reasoning_text:
511	                usage = None
512	                if continuous_usage_stats:
513	                    usage = UsageProcessor.calculate_token_usage(
514	                        prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens.get(index, 0),
515	                        reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens.get(index, 0),
516	                        completion_tokens=completion_tokens.get(index, 0),
517	                        cached_tokens=self._continuous_usage_cached_details(content),
518	                    ).model_dump()
519	
520	                yield build_sse_content(
521	                    chunk_id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
522	                    created=int(time.time()),
523	                    model=request.model,
524	                    index=index,
525	                    reasoning_content=reasoning_text,
526	                    logprobs=remaining_logprobs,
527	                    usage=usage,
528	                )
529	                remaining_logprobs = None
530	
531	        # Handle tool calls
532	        if request.tool_choice != "none" and request.tools and self.tool_call_parser:
533	            async for chunk in self._process_tool_call_stream(
534	                index,
535	                delta,
536	                parser_dict,
537	                content,
538	                request,
539	                has_tool_calls,
540	                continuous_usage_stats,
541	            ):
542	                if chunk:
543	                    yield chunk
544	
545	            # Send any remaining tool call arguments when generation finishes
546	            if finish_reason_type is not None and index in parser_dict:
547	                parser = parser_dict[index]
548	                remaining_chunk = self._check_for_unstreamed_tool_args(
549	                    parser, content, request, index
550	                )
551	                if remaining_chunk:
552	                    yield remaining_chunk
553	
554	        else:
555	            # Regular content
556	            if delta:
557	                usage = None
558	                if continuous_usage_stats:
559	                    usage = UsageProcessor.calculate_token_usage(
560	                        prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens.get(index, 0),
561	                        reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens.get(index, 0),
562	                        completion_tokens=completion_tokens.get(index, 0),
563	                        cached_tokens=self._continuous_usage_cached_details(content),
564	                    ).model_dump()
565	
566	                yield build_sse_content(
567	                    chunk_id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
568	                    created=int(time.time()),
569	                    model=request.model,
570	                    index=index,
571	                    content=delta,
572	                    logprobs=remaining_logprobs,
573	                    usage=usage,
574	                )
575	                remaining_logprobs = None
576	
577	        # Flush logprobs still unattached this step — only when a parser is
578	        # active, since _process_tool_call_stream may consume the delta and emit
579	        # no content chunk. On the plain path an empty-delta step has no chunk
580	        # to attach to either way, and a standalone empty-delta logprobs chunk
581	        # is not a shape clients expect.
582	        if remaining_logprobs is not None and (
583	            self.reasoning_parser or self.tool_call_parser
584	        ):
585	            usage = None
586	            if continuous_usage_stats:
587	                usage = UsageProcessor.calculate_token_usage(
588	                    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens.get(index, 0),
589	                    reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens.get(index, 0),
590	                    completion_tokens=completion_tokens.get(index, 0),
591	                    cached_tokens=self._continuous_usage_cached_details(content),
592	                ).model_dump()
593	
594	            yield build_sse_content(
595	                chunk_id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
596	                created=int(time.time()),
597	                model=request.model,
598	                index=index,
599	                logprobs=remaining_logprobs,
600	                usage=usage,
601	            )
602	
603	    def _validate_request(self, request: ChatCompletionRequest) -> Optional[str]:
604	        """Validate that the input is valid."""
605	        if not request.messages:
606	            return "Messages cannot be empty."
607	
608	        if (
609	            isinstance(request.tool_choice, str)
610	            and request.tool_choice.lower() == "required"
611	            and not request.tools
612	        ):
613	            return "Tools cannot be empty if tool choice is set to required."
614	
615	        if request.tool_choice is not None and not isinstance(request.tool_choice, str):
616	            if not request.tools:
617	                return "Tools cannot be empty if tool choice is set to a specific tool."
618	            tool_name = request.tool_choice.function.name
619	            tool_exists = any(tool.function.name == tool_name for tool in request.tools)
620	            if not tool_exists:
621	                return f"Tool '{tool_name}' not found in tools list."
622	
623	        # Validate tool definitions
624	        for i, tool in enumerate(request.tools or []):
625	            if tool.function.parameters is None:
626	                continue
627	            try:
628	                # Rewrite DB/ORM-style aliases (e.g. "varchar", "enum", "int")
629	                # to standard JSON Schema types before validation. RecursionError
630	                # guards against hand-crafted cyclic schemas so the request gets
631	                # a 400 instead of crashing into a 500.
632	                normalize_json_schema_types(tool.function.parameters)
633	                Draft202012Validator.check_schema(tool.function.parameters)
634	            except SchemaError as e:
635	                return f"Tool {i} function has invalid 'parameters' schema: {str(e)}"
636	            except RecursionError:
637	                return (
638	                    f"Tool {i} function 'parameters' schema is too deeply nested "
639	                    "or contains a cycle."
640	                )
641	
642	        max_output_tokens = request.max_completion_tokens or request.max_tokens
643	        server_context_length = self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.context_length
644	        if (
645	            max_output_tokens
646	            and server_context_length
647	            and max_output_tokens > server_context_length
648	        ) and not self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.allow_auto_truncate:
649	            return (
650	                f"max_completion_tokens is too large: {max_output_tokens}."
651	                f"This model supports at most {server_context_length} completion tokens."
652	            )
653	
654	        if request.response_format and request.response_format.type == "json_schema":
655	            schema = getattr(request.response_format.json_schema, "schema_", None)
656	            if schema is None:
657	                return "schema_ is required for json_schema response format request."
658	
659	        return None
660	
661	    def _convert_to_internal_request(
662	        self,
663	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
664	        raw_request: Request = None,
665	    ) -> tuple[GenerateReqInput, ChatCompletionRequest]:
666	        reasoning_effort = (
667	            request.chat_template_kwargs.pop("reasoning_effort", None)
668	            if request.chat_template_kwargs
669	            else None
670	        )
671	        if self.is_gpt_oss and reasoning_effort == "none":
672	            raise ValueError(
673	                f"Harmony does not support reasoning effort {reasoning_effort}"
674	            )
675	
676	        if reasoning_effort is not None:
677	            request.reasoning_effort = reasoning_effort
678	
679	        if request.stream:
680	            if request.return_prompt_token_ids:
681	                raise ValueError(
682	                    "return_prompt_token_ids is not supported with streaming. "
683	                    "Please set stream=false when using return_prompt_token_ids=true."
684	                )
685	            if request.return_meta_info:
686	                raise ValueError(
687	                    "return_meta_info is not supported with streaming. "
688	                    "Please set stream=false when using return_meta_info=true."
689	                )
690	
691	        is_multimodal = self.tokenizer_manager.model_config.is_multimodal
692	
693	        # Process messages and apply chat template
694	        processed_messages = self._process_messages(request, is_multimodal)
695	        # Build sampling parameters
696	        sampling_params = request.to_sampling_params(
697	            stop=processed_messages.stop,
698	            model_generation_config=self.default_sampling_params,
699	            tool_call_constraint=processed_messages.tool_call_constraint,
700	        )
701	
702	        # Handle single vs multiple requests
703	        if request.input_ids is not None:
704	            prompt_kwargs = {"input_ids": processed_messages.prompt_ids}
705	        elif is_multimodal:
706	            # Standard VLMs render a text prompt (with placeholder strings) for the MM
707	            # processor to tokenize. Inkling's custom encoder instead produces pre-rendered
708	            # input_ids with single placeholders; pass those through so the MM processor
709	            # expands them rather than re-tokenizing an empty prompt. Gated on the Inkling
710	            # encoding spec so every other model keeps the standard text path.
711	            if (
712	                self.chat_encoding_spec == "inkling"
713	                and isinstance(processed_messages.prompt_ids, list)
714	                and processed_messages.prompt_ids
715	            ):
716	                prompt_kwargs = {"input_ids": processed_messages.prompt_ids}
717	            else:
718	                prompt_kwargs = {"text": processed_messages.prompt}
719	        else:
720	            if isinstance(processed_messages.prompt_ids, str):
721	                prompt_kwargs = {"text": processed_messages.prompt_ids}
722	            else:
723	                prompt_kwargs = {"input_ids": processed_messages.prompt_ids}
724	
725	        # Extract custom labels from raw request headers
726	        custom_labels = self.extract_custom_labels(raw_request)
727	
728	        # Extract routed_dp_rank from header (has higher priority than body)
729	        effective_routed_dp_rank = self.extract_routed_dp_rank_from_header(
730	            raw_request, request.routed_dp_rank
731	        )
732	
733	        # Resolve LoRA adapter from model parameter or explicit lora_path
734	        lora_path = self._resolve_lora_path(request.model, request.lora_path)
735	        img_max_dynamic_patch, vid_max_dynamic_patch = _extract_max_dynamic_patch(
736	            request
737	        )
738	        require_reasoning = self._get_reasoning_from_request(request)
739	
740	        adapted_request = GenerateReqInput(
741	            **prompt_kwargs,
742	            image_data=processed_messages.image_data,
743	            video_data=processed_messages.video_data,
744	            audio_data=processed_messages.audio_data,
745	            sampling_params=sampling_params,
746	            return_logprob=request.logprobs,
747	            logprob_start_len=-1,
748	            top_logprobs_num=request.top_logprobs or 0,
749	            stream=request.stream,
750	            return_text_in_logprobs=True,
751	            modalities=processed_messages.modalities,
752	            lora_path=lora_path,
753	            bootstrap_host=request.bootstrap_host,
754	            bootstrap_port=request.bootstrap_port,
755	            bootstrap_room=request.bootstrap_room,
756	            routed_dp_rank=effective_routed_dp_rank,
757	            disagg_prefill_dp_rank=request.disagg_prefill_dp_rank,
758	            return_hidden_states=request.return_hidden_states,
759	            return_routed_experts=request.return_routed_experts,
760	            routed_experts_start_len=request.routed_experts_start_len,
761	            rid=request.rid,
762	            session_id=request.session_id,
763	            extra_key=self._compute_extra_key(request),
764	            require_reasoning=require_reasoning,
765	            priority=request.priority,
766	            routing_key=self.extract_routing_key(raw_request),
767	            custom_labels=custom_labels,
768	            custom_logit_processor=request.custom_logit_processor,
769	            images_config=getattr(request, "images_config", None),
770	            image_max_dynamic_patch=img_max_dynamic_patch,
771	            video_max_dynamic_patch=vid_max_dynamic_patch,
772	            max_dynamic_patch=getattr(request, "max_dynamic_patch", None),
773	            use_audio_in_video=getattr(request, "use_audio_in_video", False),
774	            return_prompt_token_ids=request.return_prompt_token_ids,
775	        )
776	
777	        return adapted_request, request
778	
779	    def _process_messages(
780	        self, request: ChatCompletionRequest, is_multimodal: bool
781	    ) -> MessageProcessingResult:
782	        """Process chat messages and apply chat template"""
783	        if self.default_chat_template_kwargs:
784	            ctk = dict(request.chat_template_kwargs or {})
785	            for k, v in self.default_chat_template_kwargs.items():
786	                ctk.setdefault(k, v)
787	            request.chat_template_kwargs = ctk
788	            effort = ctk.get("reasoning_effort")
789	            if effort is not None and request.reasoning_effort is None:
790	                request.reasoning_effort = effort
791	
792	        # GptOss model needs to keep special tokens for harmony parsing
793	        if self.is_gpt_oss or self.is_gemma4:
794	            request.skip_special_tokens = False
795	
796	        self._patch_reasoning_skip_special_tokens(request)
797	
798	        thinking_mode = self._get_reasoning_from_request(request)
799	        # SGLang's ReasonerGrammarBackend owns the reasoning prefix
800	        # when --reasoning-parser is configured, so builtin xgrammar
801	        # tags must describe only the post-reasoning tool-call suffix.
802	        xgrammar_reasoning = thinking_mode and (
803	            self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.reasoning_parser is None
804	        )
805	        tool_call_constraint = None
806	
807	        # Apply chat template and its stop strings
808	        tools = None
809	        if request.tools and request.tool_choice != "none":
810	            request.skip_special_tokens = False
811	            if not isinstance(request.tool_choice, str):
812	                tools = [
813	                    item.model_dump()
814	                    for item in request.tools
815	                    if item.function.name == request.tool_choice.function.name
816	                ]
817	            else:
818	                tools = [item.model_dump() for item in request.tools]
819	            if self.tool_call_parser:
820	                parser = FunctionCallParser(
821	                    request.tools,
822	                    self.tool_call_parser,
823	                    tokenizer=self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer,
824	                )
825	                tool_call_constraint = parser.get_structure_constraint(
826	                    request.tool_choice,
827	                    parallel_tool_calls=request.parallel_tool_calls,
828	                    thinking_mode=xgrammar_reasoning,
829	                )
830	            # Fallback: use generic JSON schema for required/named tool choice
831	            # only when no parser-specific constraint was set
832	            if tool_call_constraint is None and (
833	                request.tool_choice == "required"
834	                or isinstance(request.tool_choice, ToolChoice)
835	            ):
836	                json_schema = get_json_schema_constraint(
837	                    request.tools,
838	                    request.tool_choice,
839	                    parallel_tool_calls=request.parallel_tool_calls,
840	                )
841	                tool_call_constraint = ("json_schema", json_schema)
842	
843	        # When input_ids are provided, skip template tokenization entirely;
844	        # only stop tokens and tool_call_constraint are needed.
845	        if request.input_ids is not None:
846	            result = MessageProcessingResult(
847	                prompt="",
848	                prompt_ids=request.input_ids,
849	                image_data=None,
850	                audio_data=None,
851	                video_data=None,
852	                modalities=[],
853	                stop=request.stop or [],
854	            )
855	        elif self.template_manager.chat_template_name is None:
856	            result = self._apply_jinja_template(request, tools, is_multimodal)
857	        else:
858	            result = self._apply_conversation_template(request, is_multimodal)
859	
860	        result.tool_call_constraint = tool_call_constraint
861	        return result
862	
863	    def _apply_jinja_template(
864	        self,
865	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
866	        tools: Optional[List[Dict]],
867	        is_multimodal: bool,
868	    ) -> MessageProcessingResult:
869	        """Apply Jinja chat template"""
870	        prompt = ""
871	        prompt_ids = []
872	        openai_compatible_messages = []
873	        image_data = []
874	        video_data = []
875	        audio_data = []
876	        modalities = []
877	
878	        template_content_format = self.template_manager.jinja_template_content_format
879	
880	        # Try custom encoding first (override in subclass for custom renderers)
881	        thinking_requested = (request.chat_template_kwargs or {}).get(
882	            "thinking", envs.SGLANG_DEFAULT_THINKING.get()
883	        )
884	        thinking_mode = (
885	            ThinkingMode.THINKING if thinking_requested else ThinkingMode.CHAT
886	        )
887	        messages = [msg.model_dump() for msg in request.messages]
888	        for message in messages:
889	            normalize_assistant_tool_call_arguments(message)
890	
891	        prompt_ids = self._encode_messages(
892	            copy.deepcopy(messages),
893	            request,
894	            thinking_mode,
895	            tools=tools,
896	        )
897	
898	        if prompt_ids is not None:
899	            # Custom encoding produced prompt_ids. Text-only encoders (dsv4/dsv32) need
900	            # nothing more; Inkling is the only multimodal custom encoder and still needs the
901	            # image/audio media harvested from the messages for the MM processor.
902	            if self.chat_encoding_spec == "inkling":
903	                for message in request.messages:
904	                    msg_dict = message.model_dump()
905	                    if msg_dict.get("content") is None:
906	                        msg_dict["content"] = ""
907	                    process_content_for_template_format(
908	                        msg_dict,
909	                        "openai",
910	                        image_data,
911	                        video_data,
912	                        audio_data,
913	                        modalities,
914	                    )
915	        elif self.chat_encoding_spec is not None:
916	            # dsv4/dsv32 encoding path
917	            messages = copy.deepcopy(messages)
918	
919	            # dsv4/dsv32 are text-only and consume string content; flatten
920	            # OpenAI parts-list content here so the encoder sees a plain string.
921	            for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
922	                if isinstance(msg.get("content"), list):
923	                    messages[i] = process_content_for_template_format(
924	                        msg, "string", [], [], [], []
925	                    )
926	
927	            for msg in messages:
928	                if msg.get("content") is None:
929	                    msg["content"] = ""
930	                processed_msg = process_content_for_template_format(
931	                    msg,
932	                    template_content_format,
933	                    image_data,
934	                    video_data,
935	                    audio_data,
936	                    modalities,
937	                    use_dpsk_v32_encoding=self.chat_encoding_spec == "dsv32",
938	                )
939	                msg.update(processed_msg)
940	
941	            # Handle continue_final_message: separate final assistant message
942	            messages, assistant_prefix = self._handle_last_assistant_message(
943	                messages, request
944	            )
945	
946	            if messages[0]["role"] != "system":
947	                # insert an empty system prompt to help render tool system prompt
948	                messages.insert(0, {"role": "system", "content": ""})
949	            if request.tools:
950	                messages[0]["tools"] = [tool.model_dump() for tool in request.tools]
951	
952	            # Default encoding (dsv4/dsv32)
953	            if self.chat_encoding_spec == "dsv4":
954	                # V4 encoder only accepts "max" / "high" / None.
955	                # OpenAI protocol defaults to "medium" which V4 rejects; drop it.
956	                # Fallback: if request didn't set it, try env SGLANG_DSV4_REASONING_EFFORT.
957	                effort_source = request.reasoning_effort
958	                if effort_source is None:
959	                    env_val = envs.SGLANG_DSV4_REASONING_EFFORT.get()
960	                    if env_val:
961	                        effort_source = env_val
962	                v4_reasoning_effort = (
963	                    effort_source if effort_source in ("max", "high") else None
964	                )
965	                if request.task is not None:
966	                    encoding_dsv4.attach_task_to_last_user_message(
967	                        messages, request.task
968	                    )
969	                real_input = encoding_dsv4.encode_messages(
970	                    messages,
971	                    thinking_mode=thinking_mode,
972	                    reasoning_effort=v4_reasoning_effort,
973	                )
974	                prompt_ids = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.encode(real_input)
975	            else:
976	                real_input = encoding_dsv32.encode_messages(
977	                    messages, thinking_mode=thinking_mode
978	                )
979	                prompt_ids = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.encode(real_input)
980	
981	            # Append assistant prefix if continue_final_message is enabled
982	            if assistant_prefix:
983	                prompt_ids = self._append_assistant_prefix_to_prompt_ids(
984	                    prompt_ids, assistant_prefix
985	                )
986	        else:
987	            for msg_dict in copy.deepcopy(messages):
988	                if msg_dict.get("content") is None:
989	                    msg_dict["content"] = ""
990	
991	                # Process content based on detected template format
992	                processed_msg = process_content_for_template_format(
993	                    msg_dict,
994	                    template_content_format,
995	                    image_data,
996	                    video_data,
997	                    audio_data,
998	                    modalities,
999	                )
1000	
1001	                processed_msg["content"] = normalize_tool_content(
1002	                    processed_msg["role"], processed_msg.get("content")
1003	                )
1004	
1005	                openai_compatible_messages.append(processed_msg)
1006	
1007	            # Handle continue_final_message: separate final assistant message
1008	            openai_compatible_messages, assistant_prefix = (
1009	                self._handle_last_assistant_message(openai_compatible_messages, request)
1010	            )
1011	
1012	            extra_template_kwargs = {}
1013	            if request.reasoning_effort is not None:
1014	                extra_template_kwargs["reasoning_effort"] = request.reasoning_effort
1015	            if request.chat_template_kwargs:
1016	                extra_template_kwargs.update(request.chat_template_kwargs)
1017	
1018	            rc = self.template_manager.reasoning_config
1019	            if rc is not None and rc.effort_kwarg is not None:
1020	                if request.reasoning_effort == "low":
1021	                    extra_template_kwargs.setdefault(rc.effort_kwarg, True)
1022	                elif request.reasoning_effort in ("medium", "high", "max"):
1023	                    logger.warning(
1024	                        "Model '%s' supports only 'low' reasoning effort; "
1025	                        "requested '%s' treated as default thinking",
1026	                        self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.served_model_name,
1027	                        request.reasoning_effort,
1028	                    )
1029	
1030	            # Split apply_chat_template(tokenize=True) into render + encode so we
1031	            # can skip add_special_tokens=False on tokenizers that don't auto-add
1032	            # specials (Kimi-like, OpenAI-chat analogue of #25265). Chat
1033	            # templates already include role/special tokens, so the encode must
1034	            # avoid double BOS on tokenizers that would add it.
1035	            encode_kwargs = (
1036	                {"add_special_tokens": False}
1037	                if self._tokenizer_auto_adds_specials
1038	                else {}
1039	            )
1040	            try:
1041	                rendered_prompt = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
1042	                    openai_compatible_messages,
1043	                    tokenize=False,
1044	                    add_generation_prompt=True,
1045	                    tools=tools,
1046	                    return_dict=False,
1047	                    **extra_template_kwargs,
1048	                )
1049	                prompt_ids = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.encode(
1050	                    rendered_prompt, **encode_kwargs
1051	                )
1052	            except Exception:
1053	                # If the first attempt fails, try with flat function-only format.
1054	                # Some templates (e.g. Mistral) expect tools without the OpenAI wrapper.
1055	                tools = (
1056	                    [t["function"] if "function" in t else t for t in tools]
1057	                    if tools
1058	                    else None
1059	                )
1060	                try:
1061	                    rendered_prompt = (
1062	                        self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
1063	                            openai_compatible_messages,
1064	                            tokenize=False,
1065	                            add_generation_prompt=True,
1066	                            tools=tools,
1067	                            return_dict=False,
1068	                            **extra_template_kwargs,
1069	                        )
1070	                    )
1071	                    prompt_ids = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.encode(
1072	                        rendered_prompt, **encode_kwargs
1073	                    )
1074	                except (jinja2.TemplateError, TypeError) as template_error:
1075	                    # Template errors (e.g., from raise_exception in Jinja templates)
1076	                    # and TypeError (e.g., tojson filter on Jinja2 Undefined variables)
1077	                    # should be treated as client errors (400 BadRequest)
1078	                    raise ValueError(str(template_error)) from template_error
1079	
1080	            # Append assistant prefix if continue_final_message is enabled
1081	            if assistant_prefix:
1082	                prompt_ids = self._append_assistant_prefix_to_prompt_ids(
1083	                    prompt_ids, assistant_prefix
1084	                )
1085	
1086	            if is_multimodal:
1087	                prompt = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.decode(prompt_ids)
1088	
1089	        stop = request.stop
1090	        image_data = image_data if image_data else None
1091	        audio_data = audio_data if audio_data else None
1092	        video_data = video_data if video_data else None
1093	        modalities = modalities if modalities else []
1094	        return MessageProcessingResult(
1095	            prompt=prompt,
1096	            prompt_ids=prompt_ids,
1097	            image_data=image_data,
1098	            video_data=video_data,
1099	            audio_data=audio_data,
1100	            modalities=modalities,
1101	            stop=stop,
1102	        )
1103	
1104	    def _apply_conversation_template(
1105	        self,
1106	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
1107	        is_multimodal: bool,
1108	    ) -> MessageProcessingResult:
1109	        """Apply conversation template"""
1110	        prompt = ""
1111	        prompt_ids = []
1112	        conv = generate_chat_conv(request, self.template_manager.chat_template_name)
1113	
1114	        # If we should continue the final assistant message, adjust the conversation.
1115	        if (
1116	            request.continue_final_message
1117	            and request.messages
1118	            and request.messages[-1].role == "assistant"
1119	        ):
1120	            # Remove the auto-added blank assistant turn, if present.
1121	            if conv.messages and conv.messages[-1][1] is None:
1122	                conv.messages.pop()
1123	            # Rebuild the prompt from the conversation.
1124	            prompt = conv.get_prompt()
1125	            # Strip trailing stop tokens or separators that indicate end-of-assistant.
1126	            if isinstance(conv.stop_str, list):
1127	                for stop_token in conv.stop_str:
1128	                    if prompt.endswith(stop_token):
1129	                        prompt = prompt[: -len(stop_token)]
1130	            elif isinstance(conv.stop_str, str) and prompt.endswith(conv.stop_str):
1131	                prompt = prompt[: -len(conv.stop_str)]
1132	            if conv.sep and prompt.endswith(conv.sep):
1133	                prompt = prompt[: -len(conv.sep)]
1134	            if getattr(conv, "sep2", None) and prompt.endswith(conv.sep2):
1135	                prompt = prompt[: -len(conv.sep2)]
1136	        else:
1137	            prompt = conv.get_prompt()
1138	            if self._get_reasoning_from_request(request) and (
1139	                self._reasoning_detector is None
1140	                or not self._reasoning_detector.thinks_internally
1141	            ):
1142	                # Models with thinks_internally=True think without a leading <think> token
1143	                prompt += "<think>"  # Note(Xinyuan): hard code thinking token
1144	
1145	        image_data = conv.image_data if conv.image_data else None
1146	        video_data = conv.video_data if conv.video_data else None
1147	        audio_data = conv.audio_data if conv.audio_data else None
1148	        modalities = conv.modalities if conv.modalities else []
1149	        stop = copy.copy(conv.stop_str or [] if not request.ignore_eos else [])
1150	
1151	        if request.stop:
1152	            if isinstance(request.stop, str):
1153	                stop.append(request.stop)
1154	            else:
1155	                stop.extend(request.stop)
1156	
1157	        if not is_multimodal:
1158	            prompt_ids = self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer.encode(prompt)
1159	
1160	        return MessageProcessingResult(
1161	            prompt=prompt,
1162	            prompt_ids=prompt_ids,
1163	            image_data=image_data,
1164	            video_data=video_data,
1165	            audio_data=audio_data,
1166	            modalities=modalities,
1167	            stop=stop,
1168	        )
1169	
1170	    async def _handle_streaming_request(
1171	        self,
1172	        adapted_request: GenerateReqInput,
1173	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
1174	        raw_request: Request,
1175	    ) -> Union[StreamingResponse, ErrorResponse]:
1176	        """Handle streaming chat completion request"""
1177	        generator = self._generate_chat_stream(adapted_request, request, raw_request)
1178	
1179	        # Kick-start the generator to trigger validation before HTTP 200 is sent.
1180	        # If validation fails (e.g., context length exceeded), we can still return
1181	        # a proper HTTP 400 error response instead of streaming it as SSE payload.
1182	        try:
1183	            first_chunk = await generator.__anext__()
1184	        except ValueError as e:
1185	            return self.create_error_response(str(e))
1186	
1187	        async def prepend_first_chunk():
1188	            yield first_chunk
1189	            async for chunk in generator:
1190	                yield chunk
1191	
1192	        return StreamingResponse(
1193	            prepend_first_chunk(),
1194	            media_type="text/event-stream",
1195	            background=self.tokenizer_manager.create_abort_task(adapted_request),
1196	        )
1197	
1198	    async def _generate_chat_stream(
1199	        self,
1200	        adapted_request: GenerateReqInput,
1201	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
1202	        raw_request: Request,
1203	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
1204	        """Generate streaming chat completion response"""
1205	        # Parsers for tool calls and reasoning
1206	        parser_dict = {}
1207	        reasoning_parser_dict = {}
1208	
1209	        # State tracking for streaming
1210	        is_firsts = {}
1211	        stream_offsets = {}
1212	        n_prev_tokens = {}
1213	        has_tool_calls = {}
1214	        finish_reasons = {}
1215	
1216	        # Usage tracking
1217	        prompt_tokens = {}
1218	        reasoning_tokens = {}
1219	        completion_tokens = {}
1220	        cached_tokens = {}
1221	        hidden_states = {}
1222	        routed_experts = {}
1223	        cached_tokens_details = {}
1224	        image_tokens = {}
1225	        audio_tokens = {}
1226	        video_tokens = {}
1227	
1228	        stream_started = False
1229	        try:
1230	            include_usage, continuous_usage_stats = should_include_usage(
1231	                request.stream_options,
1232	                self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.stream_response_default_include_usage,
1233	            )
1234	
1235	            async for content in self.tokenizer_manager.generate_request(
1236	                adapted_request, raw_request
1237	            ):
1238	                index = content.get("index", 0)
1239	
1240	                prompt_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get("prompt_tokens", 0)
1241	                completion_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get(
1242	                    "completion_tokens", 0
1243	                )
1244	                reasoning_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get(
1245	                    "reasoning_tokens", 0
1246	                )
1247	                cached_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get("cached_tokens", 0)
1248	                hidden_states[index] = content["meta_info"].get("hidden_states", None)
1249	                routed_experts[index] = content["meta_info"].get("routed_experts", None)
1250	                cached_tokens_details[index] = content["meta_info"].get(
1251	                    "cached_tokens_details", None
1252	                )
1253	                image_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get("image_tokens", 0)
1254	                audio_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get("audio_tokens", 0)
1255	                video_tokens[index] = content["meta_info"].get("video_tokens", 0)
1256	
1257	                # Handle logprobs
1258	                choice_logprobs = None
1259	                if request.logprobs:
1260	                    n_prev_token = n_prev_tokens.get(index, 0)
1261	                    total_output_logprobs = content["meta_info"][
1262	                        "output_token_logprobs_length"
1263	                    ]
1264	                    if n_prev_token < total_output_logprobs:
1265	                        choice_logprobs = self._process_streaming_logprobs(
1266	                            content, n_prev_token, total_output_logprobs
1267	                        ).model_dump()
1268	                    n_prev_tokens[index] = total_output_logprobs
1269	
1270	                finish_reason = content["meta_info"].get("finish_reason", None)
1271	                finish_reason_type = finish_reason["type"] if finish_reason else None
1272	
1273	                # Track finish_reason for each index
1274	                if finish_reason_type:
1275	                    # Abort with an explicit error status_code is a system error
1276	                    # (timeout, OOM, validation): emit a streaming error chunk.
1277	                    # A graceful abort (no status_code, e.g. user-initiated via
1278	                    # /abort_request or session lifecycle cleanup) falls through
1279	                    # to the normal chunk path, matching the non-stream behavior
1280	                    # in tokenizer_manager._handle_abort_finish_reason.
1281	                    if finish_reason_type == "abort" and isinstance(
1282	                        finish_reason.get("status_code"), HTTPStatus
1283	                    ):
1284	                        code = finish_reason["status_code"]
1285	                        error = self.create_streaming_error_response(
1286	                            finish_reason.get("message", "Generation aborted."),
1287	                            code.name,
1288	                            code.value,
1289	                        )
1290	                        yield f"data: {error}\n\n"
1291	                        break
1292	                    finish_reasons[index] = finish_reason
1293	
1294	                # First chunk with role
1295	                if is_firsts.get(index, True):
1296	                    is_firsts[index] = False
1297	                    yield build_sse_content(
1298	                        chunk_id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
1299	                        created=int(time.time()),
1300	                        model=request.model,
1301	                        index=index,
1302	                        role="assistant",
1303	                        content="",
1304	                    )
1305	                    stream_started = True
1306	
1307	                # Generate streaming content (override in subclass for custom behavior)
1308	                async for chunk in self._generate_stream_content(
1309	                    content=content,
1310	                    index=index,
1311	                    request=request,
1312	                    stream_offsets=stream_offsets,
1313	                    reasoning_parser_dict=reasoning_parser_dict,
1314	                    parser_dict=parser_dict,
1315	                    has_tool_calls=has_tool_calls,
1316	                    choice_logprobs=choice_logprobs,
1317	                    finish_reason_type=finish_reason_type,
1318	                    continuous_usage_stats=continuous_usage_stats,
1319	                    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
1320	                    reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens,
1321	                    completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
1322	                ):
1323	                    yield chunk
1324	
1325	            # Send finish_reason chunks for each index that completed
1326	            for idx, finish_reason_data in finish_reasons.items():
1327	                finish_reason_type = finish_reason_data["type"]
1328	
1329	                # Change finish_reason to "tool_calls" if we had tool calls and stopped naturally
1330	                final_finish_reason = finish_reason_type
1331	                if has_tool_calls.get(idx, False) and finish_reason_type == "stop":
1332	                    final_finish_reason = "tool_calls"
1333	
1334	                matched_stop = finish_reason_data.get("matched")
1335	                yield build_sse_content(
1336	                    chunk_id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
1337	                    created=int(time.time()),
1338	                    model=request.model,
1339	                    index=idx,
1340	                    finish_reason=final_finish_reason,
1341	                    matched_stop=matched_stop,
1342	                )
1343	
1344	            # Send hidden states if requested
1345	            if request.return_hidden_states and hidden_states:
1346	                for index, choice_hidden_states in hidden_states.items():
1347	                    if choice_hidden_states:
1348	                        last_token_hidden_states = (
1349	                            choice_hidden_states[-1]
1350	                            if len(choice_hidden_states) > 1
1351	                            else []
1352	                        )
1353	                        hidden_states_chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
1354	                            id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
1355	                            created=int(time.time()),
1356	                            choices=[
1357	                                ChatCompletionResponseStreamChoice(
1358	                                    index=index,
1359	                                    delta=DeltaMessage(
1360	                                        hidden_states=last_token_hidden_states
1361	                                    ),
1362	                                    finish_reason=None,  # Hidden states don't need finish_reason
1363	                                )
1364	                            ],
1365	                            model=request.model,
1366	                        )
1367	                        yield f"data: {hidden_states_chunk.model_dump_json()}\n\n"
1368	
1369	            sglext_routed = None
1370	            if request.return_routed_experts and routed_experts:
1371	                sglext_routed = next(
1372	                    (v for v in routed_experts.values() if v is not None), None
1373	                )
1374	
1375	            sglext_details = None
1376	            if request.return_cached_tokens_details and cached_tokens_details:
1377	                first_details = next(
1378	                    (v for v in cached_tokens_details.values() if v is not None), None
1379	                )
1380	                if first_details is not None:
1381	                    sglext_details = cached_tokens_details_from_dict(first_details)
1382	
1383	            if sglext_routed is not None or sglext_details is not None:
1384	                sglext_chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
1385	                    id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
1386	                    created=int(time.time()),
1387	                    choices=[],  # sglext is at response level
1388	                    model=request.model,
1389	                    sglext=SglExt(
1390	                        routed_experts=sglext_routed,
1391	                        cached_tokens_details=sglext_details,
1392	                    ),
1393	                )
1394	                yield f"data: {sglext_chunk.model_dump_json()}\n\n"
1395	
1396	            # Additional usage chunk
1397	            if include_usage:
1398	                # Multimodal tokens are per-prompt (input side), so aggregate
1399	                # once per prompt (first choice), matching prompt/cached semantics.
1400	                total_image_tokens = sum(
1401	                    tok for idx, tok in image_tokens.items() if idx % request.n == 0
1402	                )
1403	                total_audio_tokens = sum(
1404	                    tok for idx, tok in audio_tokens.items() if idx % request.n == 0
1405	                )
1406	                total_video_tokens = sum(
1407	                    tok for idx, tok in video_tokens.items() if idx % request.n == 0
1408	                )
1409	                usage = UsageProcessor.calculate_streaming_usage(
1410	                    prompt_tokens,
1411	                    reasoning_tokens,
1412	                    completion_tokens,
1413	                    cached_tokens=cached_tokens,
1414	                    n_choices=request.n,
1415	                    enable_cache_report=self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.enable_cache_report,
1416	                    image_tokens=total_image_tokens,
1417	                    audio_tokens=total_audio_tokens,
1418	                    video_tokens=total_video_tokens,
1419	                )
1420	                usage_chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
1421	                    id=content["meta_info"]["id"],
1422	                    created=int(time.time()),
1423	                    choices=[],  # Empty choices array as per OpenAI spec
1424	                    model=request.model,
1425	                    usage=usage,
1426	                )
1427	                yield f"data: {usage_chunk.model_dump_json()}\n\n"
1428	
1429	        except ValueError as e:
1430	            if not stream_started:
1431	                raise
1432	            error = self.create_streaming_error_response(str(e))
1433	            yield f"data: {error}\n\n"
1434	
1435	        yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"

1437	    async def _handle_non_streaming_request(
1438	        self,
1439	        adapted_request: GenerateReqInput,
1440	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
1441	        raw_request: Request,
1442	    ) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, ErrorResponse, ORJSONResponse]:
1443	        """Handle non-streaming chat completion request"""
1444	        try:
1445	            ret = await self.tokenizer_manager.generate_request(
1446	                adapted_request, raw_request
1447	            ).__anext__()
1448	        except ValueError as e:
1449	            return self.create_error_response(str(e))
1450	
1451	        if not isinstance(ret, list):
1452	            ret = [ret]
1453	
1454	        response = self._build_chat_response(
1455	            request,
1456	            ret,
1457	            int(time.time()),
1458	        )
1459	
1460	        return response
1461	
1462	    def _build_chat_response(
1463	        self,
1464	        request: ChatCompletionRequest,
1465	        ret: List[Dict[str, Any]],
1466	        created: int,
1467	    ) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, ORJSONResponse]:
1468	        """Build chat completion response from generation results"""
1469	        choices = []
1470	
1471	        # Build sglext at response level (from first ret_item, as these are per-request)
1472	        first_ret = ret[0]
1473	        routed_experts = process_routed_experts_from_ret(first_ret, request)
1474	        cached_tokens_details = process_cached_tokens_details_from_ret(
1475	            first_ret, request
1476	        )
1477	        response_sglext = None
1478	        if routed_experts or cached_tokens_details:
1479	            response_sglext = SglExt(
1480	                routed_experts=routed_experts,
1481	                cached_tokens_details=cached_tokens_details,
1482	            )
1483	
1484	        for idx, ret_item in enumerate(ret):
1485	            # Process logprobs
1486	            choice_logprobs = None
1487	            if request.logprobs:
1488	                choice_logprobs = self._process_response_logprobs(ret_item)
1489	
1490	            # Handle hidden states
1491	            hidden_states = process_hidden_states_from_ret(ret_item, request)
1492	
1493	            finish_reason = ret_item["meta_info"]["finish_reason"]
1494	
1495	            text = self._decode_response(ret_item)
1496	            if isinstance(text, ErrorResponse):
1497	                return ORJSONResponse(content=text.model_dump(), status_code=text.code)
1498	
1499	            # Handle reasoning content
1500	            reasoning_text = None
1501	            if self.reasoning_parser and request.separate_reasoning:
1502	                force_reasoning = (
1503	                    self.template_manager.force_reasoning
1504	                    or self._get_reasoning_from_request(request)
1505	                )
1506	                try:
1507	                    parser = ReasoningParser(
1508	                        model_type=self.reasoning_parser,
1509	                        stream_reasoning=False,
1510	                        force_reasoning=force_reasoning,
1511	                        request=request,
1512	                        tokenizer=self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer,
1513	                    )
1514	                    reasoning_text, text = parser.parse_non_stream(text)
1515	                except Exception as e:
1516	                    logger.error(f"Reasoning parsing error: {e}")
1517	                    return self.create_error_response(
1518	                        "Failed to parse reasoning content",
1519	                        err_type="InternalServerError",
1520	                        status_code=500,
1521	                    )
1522	
1523	            # Handle tool calls
1524	            tool_calls = None
1525	            if (
1526	                request.tool_choice != "none"
1527	                and request.tools
1528	                and self.tool_call_parser
1529	            ):
1530	                history_tool_calls_cnt = self._get_history_tool_calls_cnt(request)
1531	                tool_calls, text, finish_reason = self._process_tool_calls(
1532	                    text,
1533	                    request.tools,
1534	                    finish_reason,
1535	                    request.tool_choice,
1536	                    history_tool_calls_cnt,
1537	                )
1538	
1539	            # Extract prompt_token_ids if requested
1540	            choice_prompt_token_ids = (
1541	                ret_item.get("prompt_token_ids")
1542	                if request.return_prompt_token_ids
1543	                else None
1544	            )
1545	
1546	            choice_meta_info = (
1547	                ret_item["meta_info"] if request.return_meta_info else None
1548	            )
1549	            # NOTE: content should not be None but empty string to make sure retokenize consistency.
1550	            reasoning_text, tool_calls = self._get_parsed_response_fields(
1551	                reasoning_text, tool_calls
1552	            )
1553	
1554	            choice_data = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
1555	                index=idx,
1556	                message=ChatMessage(
1557	                    role="assistant",
1558	                    content=text if text else "",
1559	                    tool_calls=tool_calls,
1560	                    reasoning_content=reasoning_text if reasoning_text else None,
1561	                ),
1562	                logprobs=choice_logprobs,
1563	                finish_reason=finish_reason["type"] if finish_reason else None,
1564	                matched_stop=(
1565	                    finish_reason["matched"]
1566	                    if finish_reason and "matched" in finish_reason
1567	                    else None
1568	                ),
1569	                hidden_states=hidden_states,
1570	                prompt_token_ids=choice_prompt_token_ids,
1571	                meta_info=choice_meta_info,
1572	            )
1573	            choices.append(choice_data)
1574	
1575	        # Calculate usage. Multimodal tokens are per-prompt (input side), so
1576	        # aggregate once per prompt (stride by n), matching prompt/cached semantics.
1577	        image_tokens = sum(
1578	            ret[i]["meta_info"].get("image_tokens", 0)
1579	            for i in range(0, len(ret), request.n)
1580	        )
1581	        audio_tokens = sum(
1582	            ret[i]["meta_info"].get("audio_tokens", 0)
1583	            for i in range(0, len(ret), request.n)
1584	        )
1585	        video_tokens = sum(
1586	            ret[i]["meta_info"].get("video_tokens", 0)
1587	            for i in range(0, len(ret), request.n)
1588	        )
1589	        usage = UsageProcessor.calculate_response_usage(
1590	            ret,
1591	            n_choices=request.n,
1592	            enable_cache_report=self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.enable_cache_report,
1593	            image_tokens=image_tokens,
1594	            audio_tokens=audio_tokens,
1595	            video_tokens=video_tokens,
1596	        )
1597	
1598	        return ChatCompletionResponse(
1599	            id=ret[0]["meta_info"]["id"],
1600	            created=created,
1601	            model=request.model,
1602	            choices=choices,
1603	            usage=usage,
1604	            metadata={"weight_version": ret[0]["meta_info"]["weight_version"]},
1605	            sglext=response_sglext,
1606	        )
1607	
1608	    def _process_logprobs_tokens(
1609	        self, logprobs: LogProbs, use_token_index: bool = False
1610	    ) -> List[ChatCompletionTokenLogprob]:
1611	        """Common helper to process logprobs tokens for both streaming and non-streaming
1612	
1613	        Args:
1614	            logprobs: LogProbs data from model
1615	            use_token_index: True for non-streaming (use token_idx), False for streaming (use index 0)
1616	        """
1617	        token_logprobs = []
1618	
1619	        for token_idx, (token, logprob) in enumerate(
1620	            zip(logprobs.tokens, logprobs.token_logprobs)
1621	        ):
1622	            token_bytes = list(token.encode("utf-8"))
1623	            top_logprobs = []
1624	            if logprobs.top_logprobs:
1625	                # - Non-streaming (use_token_index=True): uses token_idx for full data
1626	                # - Streaming (use_token_index=False): uses index 0 for pre-sliced data
1627	                top_logprobs_idx = token_idx if use_token_index else 0
1628	                for top_token, top_logprob in logprobs.top_logprobs[
1629	                    top_logprobs_idx
1630	                ].items():
1631	                    top_token_bytes = list(top_token.encode("utf-8"))
1632	                    top_logprobs.append(
1633	                        TopLogprob(
1634	                            token=top_token,
1635	                            bytes=top_token_bytes,
1636	                            logprob=top_logprob,
1637	                        )
1638	                    )
1639	            token_logprobs.append(
1640	                ChatCompletionTokenLogprob(
1641	                    token=token,
1642	                    bytes=token_bytes,
1643	                    logprob=logprob,
1644	                    top_logprobs=top_logprobs,
1645	                )
1646	            )
1647	
1648	        return token_logprobs
1649	
1650	    def _process_response_logprobs(self, ret_item: Dict[str, Any]) -> ChoiceLogprobs:
1651	        """Process logprobs for non-streaming response"""
1652	        logprobs = to_openai_style_logprobs(
1653	            output_token_logprobs=ret_item["meta_info"]["output_token_logprobs"],
1654	            output_top_logprobs=ret_item["meta_info"].get("output_top_logprobs", None),
1655	        )
1656	
1657	        token_logprobs = self._process_logprobs_tokens(logprobs, use_token_index=True)
1658	        return ChoiceLogprobs(content=token_logprobs)
1659	
1660	    def _process_tool_call_id(
1661	        self,
1662	        call_item: ToolCallItem,
1663	        history_tool_calls_cnt: int,
1664	    ) -> str:
1665	        """Process for generating a new and unique `tool_call_id`"""
1666	        if self.tool_call_parser != "kimi_k2":
1667	            # A simple uuid is sufficient for all models except for Kimi-K2.
1668	            tool_call_id = f"call_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:24]}"
1669	            return tool_call_id
1670	        else:
1671	            # Align with Kimi-K2 format: functions.{name}:{index}
1672	            # Kimi-K2 allows multiple tool_calls in one message; SGLang sets call_item.tool_index to the *local* position inside that message.
1673	            # Therefore, the index must be corrected by using `history_tool_calls_cnt + call_item.tool_index` to ensure globally unique and properly ordered.
1674	            tool_call_id = f"functions.{call_item.name}:{history_tool_calls_cnt+call_item.tool_index}"
1675	            logger.debug(
1676	                f"Process tool call idx, parser: {self.tool_call_parser}, tool_call_id: {tool_call_id}, history_cnt: {history_tool_calls_cnt}"
1677	            )
1678	            return tool_call_id
1679	
1680	    def _process_tool_calls(
1681	        self,
1682	        text: str,
1683	        tools: List[Any],
1684	        finish_reason: Dict[str, Any],
1685	        tool_choice: Optional[Union[str, ToolChoice]] = None,
1686	        history_tool_calls_cnt: int = 0,
1687	    ) -> ToolCallProcessingResult:
1688	        """Process tool calls in the response"""
1689	
1690	        is_required = tool_choice == "required" or isinstance(tool_choice, ToolChoice)
1691	
1692	        # Try model-specific parser when output is in native format.
1693	        # For required/named: only use parser when structural_tag was used
1694	        # as constraint (mirrors the streaming path). For auto: always try.
1695	        if self.tool_call_parser:
1696	            parser = FunctionCallParser(
1697	                tools, self.tool_call_parser, tokenizer=self.tokenizer_manager.tokenizer
1698	            )
1699	            should_try_parser = (
1700	                not is_required or parser.detector.supports_structural_tag()
1701	            )
1702	            if should_try_parser and parser.has_tool_call(text):
1703	                try:
1704	                    text, call_info_list = parser.parse_non_stream(text)
1705	                    if not call_info_list:
1706	                        return ToolCallProcessingResult(None, text, finish_reason)
1707	
1708	                    tool_calls = []
1709	                    for call_info in call_info_list:
1710	                        tool_id = self._process_tool_call_id(
1711	                            call_info, history_tool_calls_cnt
1712	                        )
1713	                        tool_calls.append(
1714	                            ToolCall(
1715	                                id=tool_id,
1716	                                index=getattr(call_info, "tool_index", None),
1717	                                function=FunctionResponse(
1718	                                    name=call_info.name,
1719	                                    arguments=call_info.parameters,
1720	                                ),
1721	                            )
1722	                        )
1723	                    if finish_reason["type"] == "stop":
1724	                        finish_reason["type"] = "tool_calls"
1725	                        finish_reason["matched"] = None
1726	                    return ToolCallProcessingResult(tool_calls, text, finish_reason)
1727	                except Exception as e:
1728	                    logger.error(f"Tool call parsing error: {e}")
1729	                    return ToolCallProcessingResult(None, text, finish_reason)
1730	
1731	        # json_schema constraint → JSON array output for required/named
1732	        if is_required:
1733	            original_finish_type = finish_reason["type"]
1734	            if finish_reason["type"] == "stop":
1735	                finish_reason["type"] = "tool_calls"
1736	                finish_reason["matched"] = None
1737	            try:
1738	                tool_call_data = orjson.loads(text)
1739	                tool_calls = []
1740	                for i, tool in enumerate(tool_call_data):
1741	                    call_info = ToolCallItem(
1742	                        tool_index=i,
1743	                        name=tool["name"],
1744	                        parameters=json.dumps(tool["parameters"], ensure_ascii=False),
1745	                    )
1746	                    tool_id = self._process_tool_call_id(
1747	                        call_info, history_tool_calls_cnt
1748	                    )
1749	                    tool_calls.append(
1750	                        ToolCall(
1751	                            id=tool_id,
1752	                            index=i,
1753	                            function=FunctionResponse(
1754	                                name=tool["name"],
1755	                                arguments=json.dumps(
1756	                                    tool["parameters"], ensure_ascii=False
1757	                                ),
1758	                            ),
1759	                        )
1760	                    )
1761	                return ToolCallProcessingResult(tool_calls, "", finish_reason)
1762	            except Exception as e:
1763	                logger.error(f"Tool call parsing error: {e}")
1764	                finish_reason["type"] = original_finish_type
1765	                return ToolCallProcessingResult(None, text, finish_reason)
1766	
1767	        return ToolCallProcessingResult(None, text, finish_reason)
1768	
1769	    def _process_streaming_logprobs(
1770	        self,
1771	        content: Dict[str, Any],
1772	        n_prev_token: int,
1773	        total_output_logprobs: int,
1774	    ) -> ChoiceLogprobs:
1775	        """Process logprobs for streaming response"""
1776	        output_token_logprobs = content["meta_info"]["output_token_logprobs"]
1777	        output_top_logprobs = content["meta_info"].get("output_top_logprobs", [])
1778	        if not self.tokenizer_manager.server_args.incremental_streaming_output:
1779	            output_token_logprobs = output_token_logprobs[
1780	                n_prev_token:total_output_logprobs
1781	            ]
1782	            output_top_logprobs = output_top_logprobs[
1783	                n_prev_token:total_output_logprobs
1784	            ]
1785	        logprobs = to_openai_style_logprobs(
1786	            output_token_logprobs=output_token_logprobs,

1793	    def _process_reasoning_stream(
1794	        self,
1795	        index: int,
1796	        delta: str,
1797	        reasoning_parser_dict: Dict[int, ReasoningParser],
1798	        content: Dict[str, Any],

1800	        finish_reason_type: Optional[str] = None,

1818	            end_reasoning_text, end_normal_text = reasoning_parser.parse_stream_end()
1819	            if end_reasoning_text:

1825	    def _get_history_tool_calls_cnt(self, request: ChatCompletionRequest) -> int:
1826	        """Counts the number of tool calls in the request's message history.
1827	
1828	        NOTE: This method is only useful for models that include self-increasing
1829	        history tool call idx in tool calls id, such as kimi-k2
1830	
1831	        Args:
1832	            request: The chat completion request object.
1833	
1834	        Returns:
1835	            The total number of tool calls in the history, or 0 if not applicable.
1836	        """
1837	        messages = getattr(request, "messages", [])
1838	        idx = 0
1839	        for msg in messages:
1840	            if msg.role == "assistant":
1841	                tool_calls = getattr(msg, "tool_calls", None)
1842	                idx += len(list(tool_calls)) if tool_calls is not None else 0  # noqa
1843	        return idx

1845	    def _patch_reasoning_skip_special_tokens(
1846	        self, request: ChatCompletionRequest
1847	    ) -> None:
1848	        """Keep parser-specific reasoning markers in the decoded text.
1849	
1850	        Some reasoning parsers rely on special-token delimiters that would be
1851	        removed during detokenization when ``skip_special_tokens=True``.
1852	        """
1853	        if self.reasoning_parser == "apertus2509":
1854	            request.skip_special_tokens = False

1856	        if (
1857	            self.reasoning_parser in ["mistral"]
1858	            and request.reasoning_effort is not None
1859	            and request.reasoning_effort != "none"
1860	        ):

1865	    def wrap_reasoning_history(self, reasoning_text: str) -> str:
1866	        """Wrap prior-turn reasoning in the detector's own start/end tokens.
1867	
1868	        Pulling the delimiters from the detector keeps adapters in lockstep
1869	        with any future parser that ships non-``<think>`` markers — Mistral's
1870	        ``[THINK]``, Gemma4's ``think_start_self_label = "thought\\n"``, etc.
1871	        Falling back to a plain string is unsafe: it would let prior
1872	        thinking text reach a non-reasoning model as ordinary assistant
1873	        content, so the caller must surface this state, not paper over it.
1874	        """
1875	        if self._reasoning_detector is None:
1876	            raise ValueError(
1877	                "Cannot rewrap thinking history: no reasoning detector is "
1878	                "configured for this model"
1879	            )
1880	        d = self._reasoning_detector
1881	        return (
1882	            f"{d.think_start_token}{d.think_start_self_label}"
1883	            f"{reasoning_text}\n{d.think_end_token}"
1884	        )

1886	    def _reasoning_default_mode(self) -> Optional[str]:
1887	        if self._reasoning_detector is None:
1888	            return None
1889	        return self._reasoning_detector.reasoning_default

1891	    def _get_reasoning_toggle_param(self) -> Optional[str]:
1892	        """Resolve the chat-template kwarg that toggles reasoning, if any."""
1893	        config = self.template_manager.reasoning_config
1894	        if config is not None:
1895	            return config.toggle_param
1896	
1897	        mode = self._reasoning_default_mode()
1898	        if mode in ("thinking", "enable_thinking"):
1899	            return mode
1900	        if mode in ("explicit_thinking", "explicit_enable_thinking"):
1901	            return mode.replace("explicit_", "")
1902	        return None

1904	    def apply_reasoning_enabled(
1905	        self, request: ChatCompletionRequest, enabled: bool
1906	    ) -> None:
1907	        """Force the request into the requested reasoning-on/off mode.
1908	
1909	        Mirrors the read-side logic in ``_get_reasoning_from_request``;
1910	        the two must stay in sync. Always-on models cannot be disabled,
1911	        so explicit ``enabled=False`` raises rather than silently leaving
1912	        reasoning on.
1913	        """
1914	        if not self.reasoning_parser:
1915	            if enabled:
1916	                raise ValueError(
1917	                    "Anthropic thinking is not supported for models without "
1918	                    "a reasoning parser"
1919	                )
1920	            return
1921	
1922	        if self.reasoning_parser == "hunyuan":
1923	            request.reasoning_effort = "medium" if enabled else "no_think"
1924	            return
1925	
1926	        config = self.template_manager.reasoning_config
1927	        is_mistral = (config is not None and config.special_case == "mistral") or (
1928	            config is None and self._reasoning_default_mode() == "mistral"
1929	        )
1930	        if is_mistral:
1931	            request.reasoning_effort = "medium" if enabled else "none"
1932	            return
1933	
1934	        is_always_on = (config is not None and config.special_case == "always") or (
1935	            config is None and self._reasoning_default_mode() == "always"
1936	        )
1937	        if is_always_on:
1938	            if not enabled:
1939	                raise ValueError(
1940	                    f"Reasoning parser '{self.reasoning_parser}' is always-on "
1941	                    f"and cannot be disabled via Anthropic thinking"
1942	                )
1943	            return
1944	
1945	        toggle_param = self._get_reasoning_toggle_param()
1946	        # The read side (``_get_reasoning_from_request``) returns False
1947	        # whenever ``config.toggle_param is None`` OR
1948	        # ``config.default_enabled is None``. The write side must mirror
1949	        # both conditions: if ``default_enabled`` is unset we cannot
1950	        # actually honor an ``enabled=True`` request even when the toggle
1951	        # name itself is resolvable, so writing the kwarg would set up the
1952	        # template to emit reasoning tokens while the parser ignores them
1953	        # (literal ``<think>`` markers leak into the assistant text).
1954	        config = self.template_manager.reasoning_config
1955	        read_side_supported = toggle_param is not None and (
1956	            config is None or config.default_enabled is not None
1957	        )
1958	        if not read_side_supported:
1959	            if not enabled:
1960	                return
1961	            raise ValueError(
1962	                f"Anthropic thinking is not supported for reasoning parser "
1963	                f"'{self.reasoning_parser}'"
1964	            )
1965	
1966	        chat_template_kwargs = dict(request.chat_template_kwargs or {})
1967	        chat_template_kwargs[toggle_param] = enabled
1968	        request.chat_template_kwargs = chat_template_kwargs

1970	    def _get_reasoning_from_request(self, request: ChatCompletionRequest) -> bool:
1971	        """Determine whether reasoning mode should be enabled for this request.
1972	
1973	        NOTE: This is predefined based on model's chat template
1974	        """
1975	        if not self.reasoning_parser:
1976	            return False
1977	
1978	        if self.reasoning_parser == "minimax-m3":
1979	            # M3 template prefills <mm:think> for thinking_mode=enabled, so it never
1980	            # appears in output and reasoning must be forced. Mirrors reasoning_parser.py.
1981	            return (request.chat_template_kwargs or {}).get(
1982	                "thinking_mode"
1983	            ) == "enabled"
1984	
1985	        if self.reasoning_parser == "hunyuan":
1986	            # Hy3-preview template emits no <think> when reasoning_effort is
1987	            # "no_think" / "none" / unset; forcing reasoning would route all
1988	            # output into reasoning_content.
1989	            return request.reasoning_effort not in (None, "none", "no_think")
1990	
1991	        config = self.template_manager.reasoning_config
1992	        if config is None:
1993	            # Fallback to parser-level defaults when template toggle config
1994	            # cannot be inferred (e.g., parser-only <think> templates).
1995	            mode = (
1996	                self._reasoning_detector.reasoning_default
1997	                if self._reasoning_detector is not None
1998	                else None
1999	            )
2000	            if mode is None:
2001	                return False
2002	            if mode == "always":
2003	                return True
2004	            if mode == "mistral":
2005	                return (
2006	                    request.reasoning_effort is not None
2007	                    and request.reasoning_effort != "none"
2008	                )
2009	            if mode in ("thinking", "enable_thinking"):
2010	                return (
2011	                    not request.chat_template_kwargs
2012	                    or request.chat_template_kwargs.get(mode) is not False
2013	                )
2014	            if mode in ("explicit_thinking", "explicit_enable_thinking"):
2015	                toggle = mode.replace("explicit_", "")
2016	                return (
2017	                    request.chat_template_kwargs is not None
2018	                    and request.chat_template_kwargs.get(toggle) is True
2019	                )
2020	            logger.warning(
2021	                "Unknown reasoning_default mode '%s', defaulting to reasoning disabled",
2022	                mode,
2023	            )
2024	            return False
2025	
2026	        if config.special_case == "always":
2027	            return True
2028	
2029	        if config.special_case == "mistral":
2030	            return (
2031	                request.reasoning_effort is not None
2032	                and request.reasoning_effort != "none"
2033	            )
2034	
2035	        if config.toggle_param is None or config.default_enabled is None:
2036	            return False
2037	
2038	        if config.default_enabled:
2039	            return (
2040	                not request.chat_template_kwargs
2041	                or request.chat_template_kwargs.get(config.toggle_param) is not False
2042	            )
2043	        return (
2044	            request.chat_template_kwargs is not None
2045	            and request.chat_template_kwargs.get(config.toggle_param) is True
2046	        )
